name: v3.4.132
notes:

Use the System Updates tool in Markdown Editor to download and apply `press-system-v3.4.132.zip`.

- Asset: `press-system-v3.4.132.zip`
- SHA-256: `e7724b10c511a8b00e25ba8ffe7976ac8b8865c1a691fe03c8412952b4965f51`
